Created attachment 195272
Adsl break

Hi!
  I had installed FreeBSD 10/11 on my xiaomi notebook air 12.5 (CPU 6Y30, HD 515), but when the system into "Archive Extraction" will make network break.
  I find that my ADSL disconnected and cannot reconnect when "Archive Extraction". 
  I tried to change my router and cable 4 times so I don't think my devices are damaged.
